structure.text:
Subject: NCM-P-2025-05-06 USDA Manufactured Housing Update
From: Nova Capital Markets <capitalmarkets@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-05-06 11:44:28-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

 


USDA announced a revision to their guidelines regarding manufactured homes, making existing manufactured homes eligible for financing.  See the announcement below:


Implementation of the Manufactured Housing Provisions Final Rule


The Single-Family Housing Guaranteed Loan Program (SFHGLP) published a Final Rule <https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:*2F*2Fwww.federalregister.gov*2Fdocuments*2F2025*2F01*2F03*2F2024-30270*2Fupdating-manufactured-housing-provisions/1/01000196a0fc5378-499c7d59-1e23-4c4d-aa6a-5bb011f36a7a-000000/rXP_nudwfisgE6zy0MUnEhALSPjmrN9dEBupKuS9TjM=403__;JSUlJSUlJSU!!L9-43RkOeiO9WQ!UkbxR8nAgpDAIJ8lqlR_S4ggsS1NJO1IOe1r0bom-BPsYouG3Eq6iMBJO9LigLw8De_c-2N30d-y-p_ng2XXwmoAYbWn8JAcz1U_pC7F$>  on January 3, 2025 with a correction <https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/links-1.govdelivery.com/CL0/https:*2F*2Fwww.federalregister.gov*2Fdocuments*2F2025*2F03*2F04*2F2025-03504*2Fupdating-manufactured-housing-provisions-correction/1/01000196a0fc5378-499c7d59-1e23-4c4d-aa6a-5bb011f36a7a-000000/Xehyw61-6kzBErxQH5KJ25si-Kx3TNo7TMUW-ez_yI0=403__;JSUlJSUlJSU!!L9-43RkOeiO9WQ!UkbxR8nAgpDAIJ8lqlR_S4ggsS1NJO1IOe1r0bom-BPsYouG3Eq6iMBJO9LigLw8De_c-2N30d-y-p_ng2XXwmoAYbWn8JAcz8v_zgig$>  published on March 4, 2025, making existing manufactured homes, which meet specific criteria, eligible for financing. In addition, the Final Rule reduces regulatory burdens related to manufactured housing requirements and provides flexibilities for energy efficient manufactured and modular homes located in land lease communities operating on a non-profit basis.

The Final Rule became effective on May 5, 2025.

Please note the key requirements below:

 

*	Must be an existing unit that has never been previously installed on a different homesite
*	Must have a floor area of not less than 400 square feet
*	Engineer cert is required for foundation installation and additions, as applicable
*	Must have HUD tags and HUD data plate or IBTS verification is required
*	Must have a manufacture date within 20 years of funding as evidenced by HUD data plate or IBTS verification
*	Manual underwriting is allowed






 

FOR MORE INFORMATION… 

*	For Underwriting inquiries, contact Scenario Desk <mailto:Scenariodesk@novahomeloans.com>  
*	For Product inquiries, contact Product <mailto:Productdept@novahomeloans.com> 
*	For Pricing inquiries, contact Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com> 

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

To find additional information, follow this path: NOVANet > Capital Markets <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/sites/Home/SitePages/Capital-Markets.aspx>
